strategy: Do not join late; a latecomer eats Grim Grrnadier.

Expect Polymorphs. One wizard gets veg-formed at the end of round 1, then randomly on a timer that speeds up with team size (every 9th round solo down to every 3rd with four wizards). Set up before it lands on your hitter.
Feint still works, but it triggers a Cleanse that strips negative Wards off him, so do not rely on stacked weaknesses or infections.
Hit him with Storm or Death (only 16% resist); avoid Fire and Myth (56% resist).
Blade, trap, and burst in one hit before a Polymorph disrupts your setup.
cheatNotes: Joining after round 1 makes him interrupt-cast Grim Grrnadier (Tier 3b) on the late wizard.
Casting a Feint or Mass Feint on him makes him Cleanse away all negative Wards on himself.
At the end of round 1 he Polymorphs a random wizard into a Vegetable form for 15 rounds.
He also Polymorphs a random wizard on a recurring timer set by how many wizards are in the fight.
Solo, the recurring Polymorph hits every 9th round.
With 2 wizards, it hits every 7th round.
With 3 wizards, it hits every 5th round.
With 4 wizards, it hits every 3rd round.
"Bringing down the Veghammer" means he uses his turn to cast Lamassu on the lowest-health wizard.
"As the World Turnips!" means he uses his turn to cast Wings of Night.
"Green Beanzooka!" means he casts Grim Grrnadier (Tier 3b) on the highest-health wizard.
"I find you in contempt of corn" means he casts Hungry Caterpillar on a random wizard (needs confirmation).
Even if several of these lines trigger at once, only one of the spells actually fires that turn.
